title: Section 414
content: The person in charge of a market shall prevent the entry therein of, and shall expel therefrom, any person suffering from leprosy in whom the process of ulceration has commenced or from any dangerous disease, who sells or exposes for sale therein any article or who, not having purchased the same handles any articles exposed for sale therein; and he may expel therefrom any person whom is creating a disturbance therein.
